# <Workflow Name>

## Purpose

Describe the cross-module business flow.

- Module and responsibility in the workflow.

## Trigger

- What starts the workflow.

## Steps

## Consistency

- Transaction, eventual consistency, retry, or compensation needs.

## Events

- Domain or application events involved.

## Errors

- Expected failure modes and handling.

## Open Questions

- Question that must be answered before implementation.
